texts.AppSubtitle: Configure slot generation and view the next available slots in a selected time zone.
texts.Validation:DurationMin: Duration must be at least 1 minute.
texts.Validation:DateOrder: ✕ Start date must be on or before end date.
texts.Validation:BothInPast: ✕ Both dates are in the past. Please choose an end date of today or later.
texts.Validation:StartDateAfterEndDate: Start date must be before end date.
texts.Validation:InvalidSlotDuration: Slot duration must be greater than zero.
texts.Warning:StartInPast: ⚠ Start date is in the past. Slots will be generated from today onwards.
texts.Message:NoSlots: No slots match the current filters.
texts.SlotBooking:SlotAlreadyBooked: This slot has already been booked.
texts.SlotBooking:StartDateAfterEndDate: Start date must be before end date.
texts.SlotBooking:InvalidSlotDuration: Slot duration must be greater than zero.
texts.SlotBooking:DateRangeEntirelyInPast: The entire date range is in the past. End date must be today or later.
